title: Valorium (from ValoriaMC)
description: A slightly altered version of the original ValoriaMC modpack by Servatis_Noctua, with some little extra mods that make life easier.
body:
# Valorium: A sprinkle of usefulness and performance
This modpack is a adapted version of the original **[ValoriaMC modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/valoriamc)** by Servatis_Noctua for the Valoria server.

It focuses on usefull tools, using [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) for example, and performance, [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) (a fork of Sodium).

<details>
<summary>Added mods</summary>

- [Better Brightness Slider](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-brightness-slider) (replaces Fullbright UB)

- [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium)
  - [Acedium](https://github.com/ferriarnus/acedium) (since 1.0.6) (fork of Nvidium, but works with Embeddium)
  - [Radium](https://modrinth.com/mod/radium) (replaces Canary)

- [fast-ip-ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping)

- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
  - [Jade Addons (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade-addons-forge)

- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)

- [ObsidianUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/obsidianui)

- [RyoamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/ryoamiclights)

- [WI Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom)
</details>

### Support:
Contact me, Kreckman, personally on Discord\
If you do not know me, ehhhh bad luck :)
